title: pyrus ascendens
intro: Pyrus ascendens, also known as the wild pear, is a plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus ascendens include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Pyrus ascendens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves, bark, or roots of the plant in hot water or a solvent.
